description:
Recto: Instructions for drawing up a bill of divorce. Hand of Shemuel b. Saʿadya ha-Levi? In Judaeo-Arabic. Listing various scenarios. Of note, Qūṣ and Aswān are listed as two potential cities and 1485 Seleucid = 1173/74 as a potential year. Verso: Formulary for a bill of divorce. 

The margins have accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Mentioning names such as Hiba and Bū Manṣūr, days of the week, ḥashshāshīn or jashshāshīn, and laborers (ṣunnāʿ).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Aramaic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
